_comment: Runtime configuration for ai-code-cognitive-stress. Edit these defaults to change behaviour without touching code.

work_window._comment: Fixed working day (local time, HH:MM) used for ALL calculations (interruption rate per work hour, closure deficit, in-window CODL) and visualisations.

codl._comment: Engagement weighting for CODL. A session counts at full weight (1.0) only while you're actively driving it — within foreground_grace_minutes of one of YOUR messages. The rest of the time it is alive but 'cooking' in the background and counts at background_weight. Research basis: prospective-memory monitoring cost is ~15-20% of ongoing-task capacity (Smith 2003), and open goals consume working memory until closed (Masicampo & Baumeister 2011) — so background is discounted but never free. 0.25 sits at the conservative top of that range.
